name: Chewy Granola Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light brown sugar; firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to moderate (350°F).
2. Chop fruit coarsely.
3. Pour boiling water over fruits in a small saucepan and simmer for 5 minutes. Drain and cool.
4. Beat eggs in a large bowl with an electric mixer until frothy.
5. Add sugar and cinnamon; beat until smooth.
6. Stir in the cooled fruits, granola, and cashews.
7. Pour mixture into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan, spreading evenly.
8. Bake in the preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 35 minutes.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
10. Cut into bars. Makes 24 bar cookies.
